title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF - Device updating
scenario: No notification pop-ups appear during DFU process when Notification master toggle is OFF in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Set the Notification master toggle to OFF.
4. Ensure the paired Poly Bluetooth audio device has a pending firmware update available.
5. Initiate the Device Firmware Update (DFU) process from the app.
6. While the DFU is in progress, press the Home button on the Android device to send the app to the background.
7. Observe the Android notification shade and screen for any notification pop-ups related to the DFU process.
expected: No notification pop-up appears on the Android device during the DFU process when the app is in the background, because the Notification master toggle is OFF.
